title: Trigger: Image Studio Analysis
purpose: Entry point for Image Studio object analysis. Receives imageUrl, imageWidth, imageHeight, slotId, and projectId from the Image Studio analysis panel.

configFields.description: What event fires this Trigger node. Use manual for UI-driven runs; scheduled_run for server/cron runs.
Trigger context policy. Canonical value is trigger_only; resolve entity context downstream with Fetcher or Simulation nodes.
Node output caching. auto = reuse when safe, force = always reuse, disabled = recompute each run.
Cache key scope. run = isolate each run, activation = isolate by trigger/entity context, session = reuse across session.
If true, wait until all connected input ports have values before executing the node.

semanticNodeExample.title: Trigger: Image Studio Analysis
semanticNodeExample.description: Entry point for Image Studio object analysis. Receives imageUrl, imageWidth, imageHeight, slotId, and projectId from the Image Studio analysis panel.
